name: Garlicky Baked Vegetables with Spoon Bread Topping
recipeIngredient: Tomatoes, medium, peeled and thinly sliced (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix melted butter (2 tablespoons), pressed garlic cloves (3), flour (2 teaspoons), salt (1 teaspoon), lemon-pepper seasoning (1/4 teaspoon), and crushed rosemary (1/8 teaspoon).
3. Add peas (2 cups), potatoes (2 cups), onion (2 cups), and tomatoes (2 cups) to the bowl and toss until all vegetables are evenly coated with the mixture.
4. Transfer the vegetable mixture to a greased baking dish, spreading it out in an even layer.
5. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the vegetables are tender and lightly browned, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove from the oven and serve hot.
